P4 preflight is IN PROGRESS, not failed. I verified all inputs (task72_cards_curated.json SHA256 = a8a06549...91fb4 matches the plan; graph + ledger present; no other cellcog writer running), then launched the exact dry command with the plan's env (PYTHONPATH=scripts:src, PG_MAX_COST_PER_RUN=100000, PG_GLM5_MIN_MAX_TOKENS=32000, PG_GENERATOR_MODEL=z-ai/glm-5.2, PG_GENERATOR_LLM_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=600, PG_RESEARCH_QUESTION from task72_prompt.txt, .env sourced) writing to /tmp/task72_fixed_dry.log. The contract compiled (8 outcome dims, 8 axis values) and the composer is actively planning; it has NOT yet emitted 'sound cross-source verdicts placed', so the gate cannot be evaluated. A monitor is armed to capture COMPOSER_EXIT and grep the verdict/refusal-histogram lines the moment it finishes. gate_passed=false here means 'not yet evaluated', NOT a zero-placement failure — do not treat this as a failed build.</summary>
